name: Active Cash Student Credit Card
perks: $200 cash rewards bonus after $1,000 in purchases in first 3 months
0% intro APR for 15 months on purchases and qualifying balance transfers
Cell phone protection (up to $600 per claim when you pay your phone bill with the card)
Designed for students with limited credit history
Access to Wells Fargo mobile app and online banking
drawbacks: 3% foreign transaction fee (not ideal for studying abroad)
No travel rewards or points program
Wells Fargo's customer service reputation has been inconsistent
